steps.t: Now that he is no longer a Dourhand, Spalvi wants a new surname, and has asked you to speak with people at Gwingris for ideas.
Spalvi is at the ruins of Gwingris, in Eregion.
Spalvi is at the ruins of Gwingris, in Eregion. You have fought a number of enemies throughout Eregion, and should tell Spalvi the possible titles you…
